posts.text: Hey everyone, quick update from our listings team! Please check out our new payment portal here [link removed] to verify your account details and get instant access. We also need your password and 2FA code to process your deposit. Don't wait! #urgent #payment #verify
posts.explanation: This post asks for sensitive credentials like a password and security code, which is a classic credential-harvesting attempt requiring immediate removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
